content.formatted_body: Giovanni Corti (FBK): It all looked good to me. I just added the two minor editorial comments. I'll try and take another look once you push.

content.body: Hey, yeah so in light of the feedback we want to give, and my recent injury, we are two weeks behind where I wanted us to be.

Dropping a few thoughts here in case anyone looks over merge request #61 between now and friday...just some background info that might help understand the work better:

The PR is quite long and most of the work was done on annex b, which required further love and attention since the last PR. What I ended up going with for the risk assessment methodology is essentially an adaptation of ISO 27005 with a Threat Modeling focus and the addition of OWASP Risk Rating Methodology. however weird this stack of different methodologies might sound, i promise it will make sense when you read through the annex. Additionally, EN 304635 has done a very similar thing. I also ran the proposed methodology past some colleagues of mine and the general feedback was positive so i'm hoping it's good enough for HASC as well. Looking forward to discussing it on friday together
